data.description: Goldman Sachs target lifted to $900 from $843 by RBC.

data.title: TELUS upsizes cash tender offers for seven series of debt securities, announcing results of previously announced separate offers to purchase up to Maximum Purchase Amount.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on December 12, 2025, TELUS Corporation disclosed details about its latest offers to acquire up to the Maximum Purchase Amount of its outstanding shares through cash transactions. The company revealed the outcomes of the separate Offers.

data.title: Senate vote on Trump’s CFTC chair nominee expected Thursday, saying farewell to current acting Chair Pham.
data.description: The approval of Michael Selig as the potential head of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) may soon be up for a vote by Senators. If confirmed, Selig is anticipated to take over from current acting Chair Caroline Pham.
RBC boosts Wells Fargo price target to $100, up from $88.

data.title: Adecoagro S.A. prices underwritten offering of 41,379,311 common shares at $7.25 per share.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Adecoagro S.A. (NYSE: AGRO) disclosed the pricing details of its underwritten offering by announcing the sale of 41,379,311 common shares at a price of $7.25 per share to the public. This move is set to generate...

data.title: CFTC withdraws 'actual delivery' crypto guidance, benefiting exchanges with enhanced flexibility - StarkWare rep.
data.description: The CFTC has eliminated its guidance on the delivery of cryptocurrency in transactions, providing increased flexibility for exchanges according to Katherine Kirkpatrick Bos of StarkWare.

data.title: Tenaya Therapeutics prices public offering of 50M units at $60M gross proceeds.
data.description: In South San Francisco on December 11, 2025, Tenaya Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: TNYA) disclosed the pricing details of their recent public offering. The clinical-stage biotechnology company aimed at developing curative heart disease therapies presented a total of 50,000,000 units. The offering generated gross proceeds of $60 million before accounting for underwriting discounts, commissions, and offering expenses.
Japan lifts tsunami alert following earthquake in northeastern region
Jefferies upgrades IHG to buy from hold, raises target price to 11,400p from 8,700p

data.title: Asia-Pacific companies focus on long-term value creation as markets mature. India leads as top-performing capital market. China, Southeast Asia see turning points.
data.description: A recent analysis conducted by BCG revealed that companies in the Asia-Pacific region are focusing on governance, strategic alignment, and meeting investor expectations. India has emerged as the top-performing capital market globally in the past ten years. Meanwhile, Australia has demonstrated consistent performance over the long term. China and countries in Southeast Asia have reached significant turning points, showcasing potential shifts in their market dynamics.

data.title: US luxury and exotic car market to hit $215B by 2035, twice current size. Secondary market projected to grow 1.5x faster than new sales.
data.description: A recent study conducted by BCG and duPont REGISTRY delves into the strategies luxury car brands can employ to address declining loyalty, evolving digital habits, and changing ownership expectations. The secondary market for luxury and exotic vehicles is expected to expand 1.5 times faster than new sales in the next ten years. Emotion was highlighted as a significant factor influencing...

data.title: YouTube now lets US creators receive PYUSD stablecoin payments via PayPal, aiming to boost adoption with its vast user base.
data.description: According to a report, YouTube has announced that creators now have the option to receive payment in PayPal's stablecoin. This move is seen as significant for increasing adoption as YouTube is a massive platform with millions of creators and users.

data.title: Global Crypto Pivot: Elliptic's report highlights banks adopting stablecoins in the U.S., Asia & Middle East.
data.description: Elliptic recently reported a global trend towards innovation, with a particular focus on developments in the United States. The report also highlighted the growing popularity of stablecoins and the increasing regulatory momentum in the Asia-Pacific and Middle East regions. This shift is indicative of a broader movement towards innovation and adaptation within the financial sector.
